title: paspalum distichum var. tristachyum
intro: Paspalum distichum var. tristachyum, also known as Paspalum or Tristachyum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Paspalum distichum var. tristachyum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, among others. In traditional medicine, Paspalum distichum var. tristachyum can be prepared into teas, infusions, or poultices for various herbal remedies.
